userMessage: Configure edge trigger CH1 rising 1V using tm_devices

response.text:
I built a tm_devices flow to set A-edge trigger on CH1, rising, at 1 V.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Create a new tm_devices scope flow that configures A trigger type EDGE, source CH1, slope RISe, and level 1 V.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Configure Edge Trigger CH1 Rising 1V","description":"Sets the A trigger to EDGE on CH1 with rising slope and 1 V level using tm_devices.","backend":"tm_devices","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set Trigger Type to EDGE","params":{"code":"scope.commands.trigger.a.type.write(\"EDGE\")","model":"MSO6B","description":"Set trigger A type to EDGE."},"id":"s1_2"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set Trigger Source to CH1","params":{"code":"scope.commands.trigger.a.edge.source.write(\"CH1\")","model":"MSO6B","description":"Set edge trigger source to CH1."},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set Trigger Slope to Rising","params":{"code":"scope.commands.trigger.a.edge.slope.write(\"RISe\")","model":"MSO6B","description":"Set edge trigger slope to rising."},"id":"s1_4"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set Trigger Level to 1 V","params":{"code":"scope.commands.trigger.a.level.write(\"CH1\", 1)","model":"MSO6B","description":"Set trigger level for CH1 to 1 V."},"id":"s1_5"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]},"id":"s1_6"}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Create a new tm_devices scope flow that configures A trigger type EDGE, source CH1, slope RISe, and level 1 V.
suggestedFixes: Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.
Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias "scope1" for direct chat apply compatibility.

flow.name: Configure Edge Trigger CH1 Rising 1V
flow.description: Sets the A trigger to EDGE on CH1 with rising slope and 1 V level using tm_devices.

params.description: Set trigger A type to EDGE.
Set edge trigger source to CH1.
Set edge trigger slope to rising.
Set trigger level for CH1 to 1 V.
